title: Environmental indicators - Canada.ca
content:
## Environmental indicators
Canadian environmental indicators on air, biodiversity, climate, water, waste and contaminants

## Services and information

### About the indicators
The Canadian Environmental Sustainability Indicators (CESI) program
Recent environmental indicator releases

### Search the indicators
All CESI indicators in one page that allows searching and filtering by theme
Air quality, air pollutant emissions, impacts on human health

### Biodiversity indicators
Species at risk, habitats, conserved areas, sustainable use of biodiversity
Greenhouse gas emissions and concentrations, climate change impacts
Water quality, water quantity, pressures on water

### Waste and contaminant indicators
Waste, contaminants, harmful substances in the environment
Explore maps for indicator results at the local and regional scale

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
